name: Impinj, Inc.
description: Impinj, Inc. is a leading American manufacturer and provider of radio-frequency identification (RFID) solutions. Founded in 2000 and headquartered in Seattle, Washington, the company specializes in RAIN RFID technology, which wirelessly connects billions of everyday items to the internet. Impinj provides a comprehensive platform that includes tag chips, reader chips, readers, and software, enabling businesses in industries such as retail, supply chain, healthcare, and manufacturing to gain real-time visibility into their assets. Through its global network of partners, Impinj helps organizations improve operational efficiency, enhance inventory accuracy, and deliver superior customer experiences.
